label: PASS
rationale: The target StartSession uses HostSigningAuthority with password authentication and HostChallenge "rotated" after the trajectory shows a successful Set of the C_PIN SID PIN cell to "rotated". The cited startup rules say password HostSigningAuthority credentials are C_PIN objects and the host sends the PIN value in HostChallenge, so accepting the current PIN is protocol-compliant.

label: FAIL
rationale: The trajectory first sets the C_PIN SID PIN to "new", authenticates with "new", then successfully sets the same PIN cell to "rotated". The target StartSession still uses HostChallenge "new" and succeeds. Because password startup verifies the HostChallenge against the HostSigningAuthority's C_PIN credential, accepting the previous PIN after the successful rotation is not protocol-compliant.
